title: IBM: Downgrading To Hold, No Near-Term Catalyst This Year
text: We're downgrading International Business Machines Corporation stock to a hold. We expect the tougher global IT spending environment to weigh on IBM's software and consulting revenue in 2H23 and possibly 1H24, which account for roughly 75% of its total sales. While we're constructive on IBM's shift in focus to cloud computing and A.I., we think the A.I. hype is premature, given the more muted IT spend in 2H23.
